message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in param_analyzer.zig

Add comprehensive handlers for isParameterCalledInExpr,
isParamComparedToStringInExpr, and isParamPassedToCallableInExpr:
- unaryop, boolop, compare expressions
- subscript with proper slice handling (index vs slice)
- if_expr with condition, body, orelse_value
- list, tuple, dict containers
- fstring with proper part field names (node, expr)
- listcomp, dictcomp, genexp with generators and conditions
- lambda with body
- starred arguments and keyword_args
- attribute value traversal
